Motion To Compel Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Glen Broemer, Esq. (323.907.0023; glengroemer@gmail.com) for Plaintiff (audio only).
Brian Leach, Esq. (415.775.4455; lmlawsf@aol.com) of Leach & McGreevy LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PATRICK GAVIN's Motion To Compel Form Interrogatories is DENIED as moot; sanctions granted in the amount of $1,085.00.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
